# Sigil Engineering

> A domain-agnostic specification engine. Vision in, working system out.

This site hosts an interactive viewer for a sigil specification — a hierarchical ontology of contexts, affordances, and invariants.

## Machine-readable spec

The full specification is available as JSON:

- URL: https://sigilengineering.com/sigil-spec.json
- Format: JSON tree of contexts, each with `name`, `domain_language` (markdown), `affordances`, `invariants`, and `children`

## Structure

The spec is a tree. Each node (context) contains:
- `domain_language`: narrative description in markdown
- `affordances`: named actions the context supports
- `invariants`: constraints that must hold
- `children`: sub-contexts

## How to use

Load `/sigil-spec.json` to explore the full specification tree. You can navigate by context name, read domain language narratives, and inspect affordances and invariants at any level.
